files_modified: src/ (header stamp pass — up to ~343 missing-header files)

header_coverage_baseline.note: Stale headers are present but exports list has drifted — rawExports bug must be fixed before re-stamping to avoid writing wrong exports

risks.title: rawExports fix breaks test assertions
risks.mitigation: Run full test suite after each change; keep change surgical to staleness-check normalization only

risks.title: Header stamp overwrites hand-curated @used_by or @constraints fields
risks.mitigation: Use preserveExisting:true (default) so --source-headers only fills missing/stale; verify a sample file after stamp

risks.title: RAG server not running during phases 3-4
risks.mitigation: Check server health via rag-status before each RAG phase; start with coderef-rag-server if needed

risks.title: 1782 stale headers re-stamped with wrong exports if rawExports bug not fixed first
risks.mitigation: Phase 1 (rawExports fix) is a hard gate before Phase 2 (header stamp)

decision_records.decision: Fix rawExports/exports mismatch before any header stamp pass
decision_records.rationale: 1782 elements have stale headers — if we stamp without fixing the comparison, we'll write headers with wrong exports derived from the incorrect path

decision_records.decision: Phase 2 targets missing+stale elements only (343+1782); skip defined+partial
decision_records.rationale: preserveExisting:true default behavior; avoids touching the 278 correctly-defined headers
